name: Cuban Glazed Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Guava fruit drink or apple juice
1 Jalapeno chili, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a resealable heavy-duty plastic bag, combine 2 tablespoons lime juice, the oil, 1 teaspoon ground cumin, salt, pepper, and garlic. Seal the bag.
2. Add the chicken pieces to the bag; seal and turn the bag occasionally to coat the chicken with the marinade. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour but no longer than 24 hours.
3. Remove the chicken from the marinade and discard it.
4. In a 1-quart saucepan, heat the remaining ingredients over medium heat until boiling. Reduce the heat and let simmer uncovered for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the mixture thickens and reduces by about half. Turn off the heat.
5. Turn the chicken skin-side up on the grill 4 to 6 inches from medium coals for 15 minutes.
6. Brush the chicken with the jelly mixture. Cover and continue grilling, turning and brushing frequently with the jelly mixture until the juice of the thickest pieces is no longer pink when cut.
Source: "Betty Crocker New Chicken Recipes," April, 1995. #103.
